feat.name: Overextending Feint
feat.text: You goad a foe into overextending. On a successful Feint, you can use the following success and critical success effects instead of any other effects that would occur when you Feint.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

feat.critical_success: The target takes a –2 circumstance penalty to all attack rolls against you before the end of its next turn.
feat.success: The target takes a –2 circumstance penalty to its next attack roll against you before the end of its next turn.
